candidates.description: Source snapshot from inputs/source/SKILL.md — v0.1.0, pre-optimization baseline.
candidates.predicted_judge_response: Passes workspace-init and missing-data-path cases. Likely fails or scores weakly on judge-mode-inference and blocker-first cases because those rules are buried or vague.
candidates.reflection: The original does not name the three judge-mode shapes, has no dedicated blocker-first section, and the write-back rule does not require the decision summary as an explicit gate.
candidates.selection_notes: Baseline only. Not a write-back candidate.

candidates.description: Iteration-1 optimized candidate (manual_followup path) — v0.2.0. Addresses all five engineer-review failure modes.
candidates.predicted_judge_response: Should score higher on all five eval dimensions: workspace-init, missing-data-path, manual-followup recovery, candidate/steering organization, and blocker-first behavior. The three named judge modes and the explicit dual gate (validation + decision summary) are the strongest new signals.
candidates.reflection: The candidate added ~25% more text. The core trade-off is verbosity vs. precision. The blocker-first section is now prominent but may overlap slightly with the write-back rule — the teacher should assess whether consolidation is possible without losing the signal.
candidates.selection_notes: Preferred candidate for iteration-1. Proceed to teacher review.
